papers.title: SAGE: Steering the Adversarial Generation of Examples With Accelerations
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Fan Zhang, Ziqi Yang, Shuang Luo, Tingting Li, Rui Zhang, Kui Ren
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS)
papers.abstract: 针对对抗样本生成效率低的问题，提出SAGE框架，通过加速策略引导对抗样本生成方向，在多个基准数据集上显著提升生成速度与攻击成功率，同时保持对抗样本的不可感知性。

papers.title: Purifier: Defending Data Inference Attacks via Transforming Confidence Scores
papers.authors: Ziqi Yang, Lijin Wang, Da Yang, Jie Wan, Ziming Zhao, Ee-Chien Chang, Fan Zhang, Kui Ren
papers.abstract: 通过转换置信度分数来防御数据推理攻击，提出Purifier机制，在保持模型精度的前提下有效抵御成员推断攻击和属性推断攻击，实验验证了方法的有效性与通用性。

papers.title: SmartFast: an accurate and robust formal analysis tool for Ethereum smart contracts
papers.authors: Zhaoxuan Li, Siqi Lu, Rui Zhang, Rui Xue, Wenqiu Ma, Rujin Liang, Ziming Zhao, Sheng Gao
fields: 软件工程/系统软件/程序设计语言

papers.title: ERNN: Error-Resilient RNN for Encrypted Traffic Detection towards Network-Induced Phenomena
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Jialun Jiang, Fengyuan Yu, Fan Zhang, Congyuan Xu, Xinjie Zhao, Rui Zhang, Shize Guo
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing (TDSC)
papers.abstract: 针对网络诱导现象（丢包、乱序、延迟抖动）导致加密流量检测性能下降的问题，提出ERNN框架，引入误差弹性机制增强RNN对不完整序列的适应性，在真实网络环境下保持高检测精度。

papers.title: I2RNN: An Incremental and Interpretable Recurrent Neural Network for Encrypted Traffic Classification
papers.authors: Zhuoxue Song, Ziming Zhao, Fan Zhang, Gang Xiong, Guang Cheng, Xinjie Zhao, Shize Guo
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing (TDSC)

papers.title: CMD: Co-Analyzed IoT Malware Detection and Forensics via Network and Hardware Domains
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Jiongchi Yu, Fan Zhang, Xiaofei Xie, Haitao Xu, Binbin Chen

papers.title: VulHunter: Hunting Vulnerable Smart Contracts at EVM bytecode-level via Multiple Instance Learning
papers.authors: Zhaoxuan Li, Siqi Lu, Rui Zhang, Ziming Zhao, Rujin Liang, Rui Xue, Wenhao Li, Fan Zhang, Sheng Gao
fields: 软件工程/系统软件/程序设计语言

papers.title: RIDS: Towards Advanced IDS via RNN Model and Programmable Switches Co-Designed Approaches
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Zhuoxue Song, Fan Zhang, Binbin Chen
papers.abstract: 提出RNN模型与可编程交换机协同设计的入侵检测系统RIDS，将部分检测逻辑卸载至数据平面，实现线速检测与高精度的有机结合，在INFOCOM 2024上展示了其在真实网络环境中的优越性能。

papers.title: DDoS Family: A Novel Perspective for Massive Types of DDoS Attacks
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Zhihao Zhou, Jiongchi Yu, Zhuoxue Song, Xiaofei Xie, Fan Zhang, Rui Zhang

papers.title: Effective DDoS Mitigation via ML-Driven In-network Traffic Shaping
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhuotao Liu, Huan Chen, Fan Zhang, Zhuoxue Song, Zhaoxuan Li
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing (TDSC)

papers.title: DDoSMiner: An Automated Framework for DDoS Attack Characterization and Vulnerability Mining
papers.authors: Xi Ling, Jiongchi Yu, Ziming Zhao, Zhihao Zhou, Haitao Xu, Binbin Chen, Fan Zhang

papers.title: Trident: A Universal Framework for Fine-Grained and Class-Incremental Unknown Traffic Detection
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Zhuoxue Song, Wenhao Li, Fan Zhang
papers.abstract: 提出Trident框架，面向开放网络环境中的未知流量检测难题，支持细粒度分类与类增量学习，通过三叉戟式特征解耦有效区分已知与未知流量类别，在WWW 2024上展示了跨场景泛化能力。

papers.title: FOSS: Towards Fine-Grained Unknown Class Detection against the Open-Set Attack Spectrum with Variable Legitimate Traffic
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Xiaofei Xie, Jiongchi Yu, Fan Zhang, Rui Zhang, Binbin Chen, Xiangyang Luo, Ming Hu, Wenrui Ma

papers.title: TPE-Det: A Tamper-Proof External Detector via Hardware Traces Analysis against IoT Malware

papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems (TCAD)
fields: 计算机体系结构/并行与分布计算/存储系统

papers.authors: Tingting Li, Ziming Zhao
fields: 计算机体系结构/并行与分布计算/存储系统

papers.title: Minerva: Enhancing Quantum Network Performance for High-Fidelity Multimedia Transmission
papers.authors: Tingting Li, Ziming Zhao, Jianwei Yin
fields: 计算机图形学与多媒体
papers.abstract: 提出Minerva框架，通过优化量子网络链路调度与保真度管理，提升高保真度多媒体内容在量子网络上的传输性能，为量子互联网在多媒体应用场景中的落地提供关键技术支撑。

papers.title: QuST: Optimizing Quantum Neural Network against Spatial and Temporal Noise Biases
papers.authors: Tingting Li, Liqiang Lu, Ziming Zhao, Ziqi Tan, Siwei Tan, Jianwei Yin
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems (TCAD)
papers.abstract: 针对量子神经网络面临的空间噪声与时间噪声偏差问题，提出QuST优化框架，通过分析不同量子比特的噪声特性进行差异化训练策略设计，有效提升QNN在噪声量子设备上的推理精度与鲁棒性。

papers.title: A Large-Scale P2P Botnet Detection Framework via Topology and Traffic Co-Verification
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Tingting Li, Fan Zhang

papers.authors: Zhaoxuan Li, Ziming Zhao, Rui Zhang, Haoyang Lu, Wenhao Li, Fan Zhang, Siqi Lu, Rui Xue

papers.authors: Liang Li, Feiyang Huang, Yuanhui He, Ziming Zhao, Zhuoxue Song, Tong Zhou, Zhenyuan Li, Fan Zhang

papers.title: Fortuna: Towards Efficient Selection of High-Fidelity Link for Quantum Network in the Wild
papers.authors: Tingting Li, Ziming Zhao, Jianwei Yin
papers.abstract: 面向真实量子网络中高保真度链路高效选择问题，提出Fortuna方法，基于在线学习与保真度预测模型实现链路选择决策的快速自适应，在INFOCOM 2025上验证了其在真实量子网络拓扑上的有效性。

papers.title: CyberLLM: Enable Mapping CVE to Tactics and Techniques of Cyber Threats via LLM
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Tingting Li, Fan Zhang

fields: 软件工程/系统软件/程序设计语言

papers.title: Empowering Quantum Serverless Circuit Deployment Optimization via Graph Contrastive Learning and Learning-to-Rank Co-designed Approaches
papers.authors: Tingting Li, Ziming Zhao, Jianwei Yin
papers.abstract: 面向量子无服务器计算中的电路部署优化问题，提出图对比学习与Learning-to-Rank协同设计框架，实现量子电路到多后端设备的高效映射，降低量子资源消耗并提升部署效率。

papers.title: Stealthy-AE: Generating Stealthy Adversarial Examples through Online Social Networks
papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Tingting Li, Fan Zhang
fields: 计算机图形学与多媒体

papers.authors: Ziming Zhao, Zhaoxuan Li, Tingting Li, Zhijian Xu, Yu Li, Qiang Xu, Fan Zhang
papers.abstract: 提出TNT框架，联合建模P2P僵尸网络的通信拓扑与网络流量特征，基于图神经网络与流量特征融合实现大规模P2P僵尸网络的高精度检测，在真实骨干网数据集上显著优于现有方法。
